question_patterns: give me a beginner gym day
intro: Here is a simple beginner gym day that stays repeatable.
guidance: Pick 3 to 4 movements and keep the session simple.
Use moderate sets and stop before form slips.
caution: Consistency matters more than trying to max out in the first week.

question_patterns: what should i do for upper body
intro: These are solid upper-body picks from your current workout data.
guidance: Use rows, presses, and one or two arm or core accessories.
Start with controlled sets in the 8 to 12 rep range.
caution: If a machine setup feels wrong, fix alignment before adding load.

question_patterns: what should i do for lower body
intro: These are strong lower-body options from your current workout data.
guidance: Build around leg press, leg curl, leg extension, and one accessory.
Use controlled reps and line your joints up well on the machine.
caution: If your knees feel pressured, revisit setup and shorten to a controlled pain-free range.

question_patterns: what cardio should i do today
intro: These are practical cardio directions you can use today.
guidance: Pick one repeatable machine and keep the effort steady unless the plan calls for intervals.
Walking, cycling, stepper work, and elliptical sessions all fit well.
caution: Use cardio as a weekly habit pattern instead of one all-out session.
